name: open_report
full_help:
open_report

Description: 
Open report from .rpx file

Syntax: 
open_report  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-console] [-name <arg>] [-return_string]
             [-quiet] [-verbose] <rpx>

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-file]           Filename to output results to
  [-append]         Append the results to file, don't overwrite the results 
                    file
  [-console]        Send output to console
  [-name]           Output the results to GUI panel with this name
  [-return_string]  Return report as string
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  <rpx>             Report data file to be read

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Append the results to file, don't overwrite the results file
Output the results to GUI panel with this name
